name: O-7 per-rule canary: promotion to block refuses when no fp-log file exists because 14 days clean evidence is missing
command: mkdir -p tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/canary-promote.sh" --rule-id g-ts-test --to block --tree "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'requires 14 days clean fp-log evidence' err.txt && echo fp_evidence 1>&2
